data.title: BTQ Technologies launches Bitcoin Quantum Testnet, commemorating 17 years since Bitcoin's inception. Quantum-safe fork using NIST-standardized ML-DSA cryptography. Open participation for miners, developers.
data.description: A significant moment in cryptocurrency history has been reached with the launch of the Bitcoin Quantum testnet. This event comes 17 years after the mining of Bitcoin's very first block by Satoshi Nakamoto. The testnet introduces a quantum-safe Bitcoin fork that utilizes NIST-standardized ML-DSA cryptography. This development allows for enhanced security in the face of quantum computing threats. Open to all, the testnet welcomes miners, developers, and other participants to engage in the project.

data.title: Valour's ETPs saw record net inflows of $138.2 million in 2025, showing strong demand amidst market volatility.
data.description: In 2025, Valour witnessed record net inflows with approximately $138.2 million flowing into its ETPs. This total includes $116.2 million received by the end of Q3 and an additional estimated $22.0 million in Q4. This outstanding achievement illustrates Valour's strong performance and popularity among investors, showcasing significant demand for its products in various market conditions.

data.title: Leeds Equity Partners expands team with 2 promotions and 1 new appointment amid firm growth.
data.description: In a recent press release on January 12, 2026, Leeds Equity Partners, a private equity firm headquartered in New York, revealed the advancement of Olivia Caccia and William Teplitz to the positions of Vice President. Additionally, Danielle Klimchak has been named as the Chief Administrative Officer. These strategic appointments signify a key development within the organization.

data.title: AbbVie and RemeGen sign exclusive deal for RC148, bispecific antibody for solid tumors. Jan. 12. Source: PRNewswire.
data.description: A groundbreaking drug named RC148, which is a PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibody, is currently under assessment for various advanced solid tumors, including specific types of lung cancers. On January 12, 2026, a landmark exclusive licensing agreement was struck in North Chicago, Illinois, and Yantai, China, between AbbVie (NYSE: ABBV) and RemeGen. This partnership marks a significant move in the medical field with hopes to bring innovative treatment solutions to patients.

data.title: V2X, Inc. secures SHIELD IDIQ Contract from MDA to support defense system. Jan. 12, 2026. Stock: VVX.
data.description: V2X, Inc., a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol VVX, announced on January 12, 2026, that it has secured a contract from the Missile Defense Agency's (MDA) Scalable Homeland Innovative Enterprise Layered Defense (SHIELD) program. This contract falls under the indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity (IDIQ) contract vehicle.

data.title: PureHealth Research is redefining prostate health supplements with clinical-grade formulations, setting new standards in addressing bladder concerns. From Manassas, they are committed to transparent and clinically-dosed products for overall health.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in Manassas, Va., PureHealth Research confirmed its dedication to establishing higher benchmarks for top-quality prostate health supplements. They are committed to utilizing transparent, clinically-backed formulations with appropriate dosages to tackle the underlying issues related to common bladder problems.

data.title: Realty Income partners with GIC for $1.5B+ deal, expands to Mexico with $200M commitment for industrial portfolio.
data.description: A joint venture has been established with GIC for a programmatic partnership exceeding $1.5 billion. There are plans to expand operations into Mexico with a commitment of $200 million for a long-term leased industrial portfolio in USD. GIC has made a significant investment in Realty Income's U.S. Core Plus fund. The developments were announced in San Diego on January 12, 2026.

data.title: FPA partners with firms to launch FPAi Authority for members to access AI education, tools. Nearly 50% of Americans prefer advisers knowledgeable in AI.
data.description: In a recent collaboration, the Financial Planning Association (FPA) has joined forces with Capital Investment Advisors and FutureProof Advisor to enhance their knowledge and utilization of artificial intelligence (AI). The initiative, announced on January 12, 2026, aims to cater to the increasing demand for financial advisors who are proficient in AI technologies. Surveys reveal that nearly 50% of Americans prefer to engage with advisors well-versed in leveraging AI for financial planning services.

data.title: Enhanced Games adds six new athletes to sprinting fields, including former NFL player, former Olympians, and NCAA stars.
data.description: Six new athletes, including Reece Prescod, Marvin Bracy-Williams, and Clarence Munyai, have joined the competition. Among them are former NFL player Mike Bryan, Taylor Anderson, and Shockoria Wallace. The emerging global field will also feature multiple former Olympians and NCAA collegiate stars. The announcement was made in New York on January 12, 2026.

data.title: SunOpta shares important updates before the 2026 ICR Conference. #SunOpta #ICR2026
data.description: Last week, a new report was released, revealing that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.2%, with approximately 10 million people now out of work. This marks a significant increase from the previous month, when the rate was at 5.5%. The report also noted that the number of job vacancies has decreased by 20%, indicating a challenging job market. Experts attribute this spike in unemployment to the economic slowdown caused by the ongoing pandemic, which has led to many businesses closing and laying off employees. The government has promised to implement measures to help stimulate job growth and support those who are currently unemployed.

data.title: Kitron ASA completes acquisition of DeltaNordic by issuing SEK 150 million worth of shares.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Kitron ASA issued a statement referencing their stock exchange announcement from November 19, 2025. The announcement revealed that Kitron, through its subsidiary Kitron Holding AB, had agreed to acquire DeltaNordic AB in a transaction. The acquisition involves a purchase price for DeltaNordic AB's shares, with SEK 150 million worth of Kitron shares being issued as part of the settlement.

data.title: Dubai free zone now requires licensed companies to vet crypto tokens. Changes in AML expectations may pose challenges.
data.description: The Dubai Financial Services Authority (DFSA) has introduced a new suitability model and anti-money laundering (AML) requirements that could pose challenges for licensed entities looking to back privacy-focused assets. This move may hinder these entities in justifying their support for such assets, potentially impacting financial decisions and strategies in the industry.

data.title: Monero hits new ATH of $579, mirroring Silver's 150% pattern breakout. Peter Brandt sees similarities in XMR's structure.
data.description: Monero (XMR) reached a record high of $579 on Monday, marking a 20% increase in just 24 hours. Veteran trader Peter Brandt pointed out similarities between XMR's current pattern and silver's classic inverse head-and-shoulders formation, which was followed by a 150% surge. Brandt's analysis showcases a multi-year consolidation phase on the silver chart, followed by a breakout and a subsequent climb along an upward trendline. Similarly, Monero's monthly chart indicates a comparable structure post its peak in 2021-2022, with a long consolidation period within the $150-$200 range during 2023-2024. XMR later surged past major resistance levels at around $400 in late 2025 and early 2026. The breakout above $400 could signify the start of a significant upward trend if Monero follows silver's historical pattern.

data.title: Amazon proposes opening a big-box retail store in Orland Park covering 35 acres at 159th St. & LaGrange Rd. - via Benzinga.
data.description: E-commerce giant Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) is planning to establish a significant retail presence in Orland Park, Illinois. As one of the leading global retailers, Amazon is contemplating the construction of a large-format store on a 35-acre parcel of land previously occupied by Petey's II restaurant. The proposed site is located at the southwest intersection of 159th Street and LaGrange Road in Orland Park. This move signifies Amazon's expansion into brick-and-mortar retail as it continues to ramp up its physical store presence. To track the current stock price of AMZN, visit market sources. For more details on Amazon's latest venture, check out the complete article on Benzinga.com.
EU commissioner Kubilius: European Union members are obliged to come to Denmark's assistance under EU treaty if faced with military aggression

data.title: Author Rob Chaseman introduces 15 practices of love in new book for self-healing and connection.
data.description: Author Rob Chaseman encourages readers to adopt 15 love-based practices to foster personal and global peace. Released on January 12, 2026, the book aims to counter prevailing division and disconnection trends. Located in Jefferson, New Jersey, the author's approach offers tangible ways to promote healing and unity.

data.title: Home Bancshares (HOMB) to release Q4 earnings on Jan. 14 with expected EPS of 60 cents, revenue $272.48 million. Acquires Mountain Commerce Bancorp for $150.1 million. Stock price fell 1% to $28.45.
data.description: Home Bancshares, Inc. (NYSE: HOMB) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings after the market closes on Wednesday, January 14th. Analysts are anticipating earnings of 60 cents per share for this quarter, showing an improvement from the 50 cents per share reported in the same period last year. The consensus forecast for the company's quarterly revenue stands at $272.48 million, up from $260.76 million in the previous year. In a recent development, Home Bancshares confirmed its acquisition of Mountain Commerce Bancorp for $150.1 million on December 8th. Following this news, the company's shares dipped by 1% to close at $28.45 on Friday. For further insights, interested readers can find comprehensive details, including analyst ratings, on the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: ParaZero Technologies achieved major milestones in Precision Airdrops by transforming battlefield lessons into life-saving technology in 2025.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO) based in Kfar Saba, Israel, a leading aerospace defense company, is celebrating a successful 2025 for its innovative DropAir™ Precision Airdrop System. The company, known for its smart and autonomous solutions for both manned and unmanned aerial systems (UAS) globally, has adapted lessons from recent military conflicts to develop life-saving technology. The DropAir™ system, initially designed for military use, is now being expanded into civilian, medical, and humanitarian sectors around the world. This move signifies ParaZero's commitment to utilizing its expertise in the defense industry to address a broader range of global challenges.

data.title: Ditto joins Zebra Technologies' PartnerConnect program to enhance customer service and expertise. Resilient edge computing database solution.
data.description: Ditto, a trailblazer in edge computing and peer-to-peer data synchronization, unveiled its involvement in Zebra’s PartnerConnect program today in Atlanta. This program, known for its excellence in empowering partners to expand, enhance expertise, and better assist customers, has garnered awards and is esteemed in the industry. Zebra Technologies, the host of the program, provides a base for innovation and growth opportunities. Ditto specializes in an edge-native mobile database, offering robust offline-first solutions. The announcement marks a significant step for Ditto as it joins a renowned program to further its reach and capabilities.
